# Add File Upload Functionality

## Changes

### Features Added
- ✅ File upload support for audio, video, and PDF files
- ✅ Drag-and-drop upload interface
- ✅ File type validation (MP3, WAV, M4A, MP4, MOV, AVI, PDF)
- ✅ File size limit (100MB max)
- ✅ Upload progress indicator
- ✅ Tab switcher between YouTube URL and File Upload

### UI Improvements
- Clean tab-based interface in dashboard
- File preview with name, size, and type
- Visual feedback during drag operations
- Processing state with spinner

### Technical Changes
- Updated API route to handle FormData
- Added local file storage (uploads/ directory)
- Added lucide-react for icons
- File upload component with drag-and-drop

## Screenshots

### Dashboard - YouTube Tab
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Process New Content                            │
│                                                 │
│  [🎬 YouTube URL] [📁 Upload File]             │
│                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────┐ [Process] │
│  │ Paste YouTube URL...            │            │
│  └─────────────────────────────────┘            │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Dashboard - File Upload Tab
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Process New Content                            │
│                                                 │
│  [🎬 YouTube URL] [📁 Upload File]             │
│                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │         ⬆️                               │   │
│  │  Drop your file here or click to upload │   │
│  │  Audio • Video • PDF • Max 100MB        │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                 │
│  Selected file:                                 │
│  📄 podcast-episode-1.mp3                       │
│     15.2 MB • AUDIO               [✕] [Process]│
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Processing State
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Process New Content                            │
│                                                 │
│  [🎬 YouTube URL] [📁 Upload File]             │
│                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │              ⟳                          │   │
│  │     Processing your file...             │   │
│  │     This may take a few minutes         │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Testing

1. Start the dev server: `npm run dev`
2. Navigate to http://localhost:3000
3. Sign up or login
4. Click "Upload File" tab
5. Drag a file or click to select
6. Verify file preview shows correct info
7. Click "Process File"
8. Verify content appears in list
